---
title: "captcha"
output: html_document
date: "2026-04-28"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
library(magick)
library(ggplot2)
```



```{r pressure}
randtext <- function(n = sample(5:7, 1)) {
  paste(sample(c(letters, LETTERS), n, replace = TRUE), collapse = "")
}

makecaptcha <- function(
  text = randtext(),
  width = 200,
  height = 80,
  pointsize = sample(32:38, 1),
  overlap = FALSE,
  distort = TRUE,
  nlines = sample(0:2, 1),
  ndots = sample(15:35, 1)
) {
  chars <- strsplit(text, "")[[1]]
  n <- length(chars)

  img <- magick::image_blank(width = width, height = height, color = "white")
  layers <- vector("list", n)

  basey <- sample(round(height * 0.54):round(height * 0.66), 1)
  estcharw <- pointsize * 1.1

  if (overlap) {
    steps <- sample(
      seq(round(estcharw * 0.55), round(estcharw * 0.80)),
      n - 1,
      replace = TRUE
    )
  } else {
    steps <- sample(
      seq(round(estcharw * 1.15), round(estcharw * 1.35)),
      n - 1,
      replace = TRUE
    )
  }

  xpos <- numeric(n)
  xpos[1] <- sample(10:18, 1)

  if (n > 1) {
    for (j in 2:n) {
      xpos[j] <- xpos[j - 1] + steps[j - 1]
    }
  }

  rightedge <- max(xpos) + estcharw + 15
  if (rightedge > width) {
    shift <- rightedge - width
    xpos <- pmax(3, xpos - shift)
  }

  ypos <- basey + sample(-4:4, n, replace = TRUE)
  rot <- sample(-12:12, n, replace = TRUE)

  for (j in seq_len(n)) {
    charimg <- magick::image_blank(width = 70, height = 70, color = "none") |>
      magick::image_annotate(
        text = chars[j],
        size = pointsize + sample(-1:1, 1),
        color = sprintf("gray(%d%%)", sample(8:20, 1)),
        gravity = "center"
      ) |>
      magick::image_rotate(rot[j])

    offset <- paste0("+", round(xpos[j]), "+", round(ypos[j] - 35))

    img <- magick::image_composite(
      img,
      charimg,
      offset = offset
    )

    layer <- magick::image_blank(width = width, height = height, color = "white") |>
      magick::image_composite(
        charimg,
        offset = offset
      )

    layers[[j]] <- layer
  }

  if (nlines > 0) {
    for (j in seq_len(nlines)) {
      x1 <- sample(0:width, 1)
      y1 <- sample(0:height, 1)
      x2 <- sample(0:width, 1)
      y2 <- sample(0:height, 1)

      img <- magick::image_draw(img)
      segments(
        x0 = x1,
        y0 = height - y1,
        x1 = x2,
        y1 = height - y2,
        col = gray(runif(1, 0.65, 0.80)),
        lwd = 1
      )
      dev.off()
    }
  }

  if (ndots > 0) {
    for (j in seq_len(ndots)) {
      x <- runif(1, 0, width)
      y <- runif(1, 0, height)

      img <- magick::image_draw(img)
      points(
        x = x,
        y = height - y,
        pch = 16,
        cex = runif(1, 0.10, 0.22),
        col = gray(runif(1, 0.70, 0.90))
      )
      dev.off()
    }
  }

  disttype <- "none"
  shearx <- NULL
  sheary <- NULL
  ang <- NULL
  impl <- NULL

  if (distort) {
    disttype <- sample(
      c("none", "shear", "rotate"),
      1,
      prob = c(0.20, 0.30, 0.25)
    )

    if (disttype == "shear") {
      shearx <- sample(-5:5, 1)
      sheary <- sample(-2:2, 1)

      img <- magick::image_shear(
        img,
        geometry = sprintf("%dx%d", shearx, sheary)
      )

      layers <- lapply(
        layers,
        \(u) magick::image_shear(
          u,
          geometry = sprintf("%dx%d", shearx, sheary)
        )
      )
    } else if (disttype == "rotate") {
      ang <- runif(1, -8, 8)

      img <- magick::image_rotate(img, ang)
      layers <- lapply(layers, \(u) magick::image_rotate(u, ang))
    } else if (disttype == "implode") {
      impl <- runif(1, -0.08, 0.08)

      img <- magick::image_implode(img, factor = impl)
      layers <- lapply(layers, \(u) magick::image_implode(u, factor = impl))
    } else if (disttype == "combo") {
      shearx <- sample(-4:4, 1)
      sheary <- sample(-2:2, 1)
      ang <- runif(1, -6, 6)
      impl <- runif(1, -0.06, 0.06)

      img <- img |>
        magick::image_shear(
          geometry = sprintf("%dx%d", shearx, sheary)
        ) |>
        magick::image_rotate(ang) |>
        magick::image_implode(factor = impl)

      layers <- lapply(
        layers,
        \(u) u |>
          magick::image_shear(
            geometry = sprintf("%dx%d", shearx, sheary)
          ) |>
          magick::image_rotate(ang) |>
          magick::image_implode(factor = impl)
      )
    }
  }

  img <- img |>
    magick::image_background("white", flatten = TRUE) |>
    magick::image_extent(
      geometry = sprintf("%dx%d", width, height),
      gravity = "center",
      color = "white"
    )

  layers <- lapply(
    layers,
    \(u) u |>
      magick::image_background("white", flatten = TRUE) |>
      magick::image_extent(
        geometry = sprintf("%dx%d", width, height),
        gravity = "center",
        color = "white"
      )
  )

  list(
    img = img,
    text = text,
    layers = layers
  )
}

imgtopoints <- function(
  img,
  cutoff = 0.82,
  border = 2,
  fuzzband = c(0.70, 0.85),
  fuzzprob = 0.18
) {
  g <- magick::image_convert(img, colorspace = "gray")
  a <- magick::image_data(g, channels = "gray")

  m <- matrix(
    as.integer(a[1, , ]),
    nrow = dim(a)[2],
    ncol = dim(a)[3]
  ) / 255

  keep <- m < cutoff

  if (!is.null(border) && border > 0) {
    keep[1:border, ] <- FALSE
    keep[(nrow(keep) - border + 1):nrow(keep), ] <- FALSE
    keep[, 1:border] <- FALSE
    keep[, (ncol(keep) - border + 1):ncol(keep)] <- FALSE
  }

  if (!is.null(fuzzband)) {
    near <- m >= fuzzband[1] & m < fuzzband[2]

    if (!is.null(border) && border > 0) {
      near[1:border, ] <- FALSE
      near[(nrow(near) - border + 1):nrow(near)] <- FALSE
      near[, 1:border] <- FALSE
      near[, (ncol(near) - border + 1):ncol(near)] <- FALSE
    }

    keep <- keep | (
      near &
      (matrix(runif(length(m)), nrow(m), ncol(m)) < fuzzprob)
    )
  }

  idx <- which(keep, arr.ind = TRUE)

  data.frame(
    x = idx[, 2],
    y = idx[, 1]
  )
}

thinpoints <- function(pts, keepfrac = 0.5) {
  keep <- runif(nrow(pts)) < keepfrac
  pts[keep, , drop = FALSE]
}

croppoints <- function(pts, pad = 2) {
  xmin <- min(pts$x) - pad
  xmax <- max(pts$x) + pad
  ymin <- min(pts$y) - pad
  ymax <- max(pts$y) + pad

  out <- subset(
    pts,
    x >= xmin & x <= xmax & y >= ymin & y <= ymax
  )

  out$x <- out$x - min(out$x)
  out$y <- out$y - min(out$y)

  out
}

addpointnoise <- function(
  pts,
  nbg = 150,
  jitter = 0.35,
  dropprob = 0.02,
  xypad = 3
) {
  pts$x <- pts$x + rnorm(nrow(pts), 0, jitter)
  pts$y <- pts$y + rnorm(nrow(pts), 0, jitter)

  if (dropprob > 0) {
    keep <- runif(nrow(pts)) > dropprob
    pts <- pts[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  }

  xr <- range(pts$x)
  yr <- range(pts$y)

  noise <- data.frame(
    x = runif(nbg, xr[1] - xypad, xr[2] + xypad),
    y = runif(nbg, yr[1] - xypad, yr[2] + xypad),
    label = "noise"
  )

  if (is.null(pts$label)) {
    pts$label <- "signal"
  }

  rbind(pts, noise)
}

makepointcaptcha <- function(
  text = randtext(),
  cutoff = 0.82,
  fuzzprob = 0.20,
  nbg = 180,
  jitter = 0.10
) {
  z <- makecaptcha(
    text = text,
    distort = TRUE,
    overlap = TRUE,
    ndots = 0
  )

  ptslist <- lapply(
    seq_along(z$layers),
    function(j) {
      out <- imgtopoints(
        z$layers[[j]],
        cutoff = cutoff,
        fuzzband = c(0.70, 0.86),
        fuzzprob = fuzzprob,
        border = 2
      )

      out$label <- paste0("char", j)
      out
    }
  )

  pts <- do.call(rbind, ptslist) |>
    croppoints(pad = 1) |>
    thinpoints(keepfrac = 0.99) |>
    addpointnoise(
      nbg = nbg,
      jitter = jitter,
      dropprob = 0,
      xypad = 2
    )

  list(
    text = z$text,
    pts = pts,
    img = z$img
  )
}
```

```{r generate}
z <- makepointcaptcha()
oldx <- z$pts$x
oldy <- z$pts$y
z$pts$x <- -oldy
z$pts$y <- oldx
z$pts$x <- z$pts$x - min(z$pts$x)
z$pts$y <- z$pts$y - min(z$pts$y)
z$pts$x <- max(z$pts$x) - z$pts$x

z$text

ggplot(z$pts, aes(x, -y)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.6) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void()
```


```{r savegoodfn}
savegoodz <- function(z, path = "goodzs.rds") {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    db <- readRDS(path)
  } else {
    db <- list()
  }

  id <- paste0("z", length(db) + 1)
  db[[id]] <- z

  saveRDS(db, path)

  message("Saved as ", id, " in ", path)
  invisible(id)
}
```

```{r SAVE}
savegoodz(z)

```

```{r accesssaved}
goodzs <- readRDS("goodzs.rds")
names(goodzs)
goodzs$z16$text
goodzs$z16$pts
```

```{r generate_100}
zlist <- replicate(
  100,
  {
    z <- makepointcaptcha()
    
    oldx <- z$pts$x
    oldy <- z$pts$y
    z$pts$x <- -oldy
    z$pts$y <- oldx
    z$pts$x <- z$pts$x - min(z$pts$x)
    z$pts$y <- z$pts$y - min(z$pts$y)
    z$pts$x <- max(z$pts$x) - z$pts$x
    
    z
  },
  simplify = FALSE
)

names(zlist) <- paste0("z", seq_along(zlist))

saveRDS(zlist, "z100.rds")

length(zlist)  # should be 100

```


```{r visualize}

library(dbscan)
library(ggplot2)

goodzs <- readRDS("goodzs.rds")

pts <- goodzs$z14$pts
x <- pts[, c("x", "y")]

fit <- dbscan(x, eps = 3, minPts = 7)

pts$cluster <- factor(fit$cluster)

ggplot(pts, aes(x = x, y = y, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.8, alpha = 0.8) +
  coord_equal() +
  scale_y_reverse() +
  theme_minimal()

```


```{r hdbscan}
goodzs <- readRDS("goodzs.rds")

pts <- goodzs$z14$pts
hdb <- hdbscan(as.matrix(pts[, c("x", "y")]), minPts = 11)
pts$cluster <- factor(hdb$cluster)

library(viridis)

ggplot(pts, aes(x, -y, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.7) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = "none")
```

```{r spectral}
library(kernlab)
pts <- goodzs$z14$pts

k <- 6

sp <- specc(as.matrix(pts[, c("x", "y")]), centers = k)
pts$cluster <- factor(sp)

ggplot(pts, aes(x, -y, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.7) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = "none")
```

```{r single}
pts <- goodzs$z14$pts

d <- dist(pts[, c("x", "y")])

hc <- hclust(d, method = "single")

k <- 8
pts$cluster <- factor(cutree(hc, k = k))

ggplot(pts, aes(x, -y, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.7) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = "none")
```


```{r ari-table}
library(dbscan)
library(kernlab)
library(mclust)
library(dplyr)

library(dbscan)
library(kernlab)
library(mclust)   # for adjustedRandIndex

zlist <- readRDS("z100.rds")

results <- data.frame(
  dbscan = numeric(length(zlist)),
  hdbscan = numeric(length(zlist)),
  spectral = numeric(length(zlist)),
  single = numeric(length(zlist))
)

for (i in seq_along(zlist)) {
  
  pts <- zlist[[i]]$pts
  
  # remove noise points for evaluation
  pts_eval <- pts[pts$label != "noise", ]
  
  x <- as.matrix(pts_eval[, c("x", "y")])
  truth <- as.factor(pts_eval$label)
  
  k <- length(unique(truth))  # true number of characters
  
  # --- DBSCAN ---
  db <- dbscan(x, eps = 3, minPts = 7)
  results$dbscan[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truth, db$cluster)
  
  # --- HDBSCAN ---
  hdb <- hdbscan(x, minPts = 11)
  results$hdbscan[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truth, hdb$cluster)
  
  # --- Spectral ---
  sp <- specc(x, centers = k)
  results$spectral[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truth, sp)
  
  # --- Hierarchical (single linkage) ---
  d <- dist(x)
  hc <- hclust(d, method = "single")
  pred <- cutree(hc, k = k)
  results$single[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truth, pred)
}

# average ARI per method
colMeans(results)

summary_table <- data.frame(
  Method = colnames(results),
  Mean_ARI = colMeans(results),
  SD_ARI = apply(results, 2, sd)
)

summary_table
```

```{r 64}
for (i in 64:length(zlist)) {

  pts <- zlist[[i]]$pts
  pts_eval <- pts[pts$label != "noise", ]

  x <- as.matrix(pts_eval[, c("x", "y")])
  truth <- as.factor(pts_eval$label)

  k <- length(unique(truth))

  # DBSCAN
  db <- dbscan(x, eps = 3, minPts = 7)
  results$dbscan[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truth, db$cluster)

  # HDBSCAN
  hdb <- hdbscan(x, minPts = 11)
  results$hdbscan[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truth, hdb$cluster)

  # Spectral
  sp <- specc(x, centers = k)
  results$spectral[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truth, sp)

  # Hierarchical
  d <- dist(x)
  hc <- hclust(d, method = "single")
  pred <- cutree(hc, k = k)
  results$single[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truth, pred)

  cat("Finished", i, "\n")
}

```


```{r getaritable}
summarytable <- data.frame(
  Method = colnames(results),
  MeanARI = colMeans(results, na.rm = TRUE),
  SDARI = apply(results, 2, sd, na.rm = TRUE)
)

summarytable |> arrange(desc(MeanARI))
```


```{r test}
set.seed(1)
idx <- sample(1:100, 5)

for (i in idx) {
  pts <- zlist[[i]]$pts
  pts_eval <- pts[pts$label != "noise", ]

  x <- as.matrix(pts_eval[, c("x", "y")])
  truth <- as.factor(pts_eval$label)
  k <- length(unique(truth))

  d <- dist(x)
  hc <- hclust(d, method = "single")
  pred <- cutree(hc, k = k)

  cat("i =", i, 
      "ARI =", adjustedRandIndex(truth, pred), "\n")
}

```


```{r test2}
zlist <- readRDS("z100.rds")

ressignal <- data.frame(
  dbscan = rep(NA_real_, length(zlist)),
  hdbscan = rep(NA_real_, length(zlist)),
  spectral = rep(NA_real_, length(zlist)),
  single = rep(NA_real_, length(zlist))
)

resfull <- data.frame(
  dbscan = rep(NA_real_, length(zlist)),
  hdbscan = rep(NA_real_, length(zlist)),
  spectral = rep(NA_real_, length(zlist)),
  single = rep(NA_real_, length(zlist))
)

for (i in seq_along(zlist)) {
  pts <- zlist[[i]]$pts
  x <- as.matrix(pts[, c("x", "y")])

  keep <- pts$label != "noise"
  truthsig <- as.factor(pts$label[keep])
  truthall <- as.factor(pts$label)
  k <- length(unique(truthsig))

  dbfit <- tryCatch(dbscan(x, eps = 3, minPts = 7), error = \(e) NULL)
  hdbfit <- tryCatch(hdbscan(x, minPts = 11), error = \(e) NULL)
  spfit <- tryCatch(specc(x, centers = k), error = \(e) NULL)
  singlefit <- tryCatch({
    d <- dist(x)
    hc <- hclust(d, method = "single")
    cutree(hc, k = k)
  }, error = \(e) NULL)

  if (!is.null(dbfit)) {
    ressignal$dbscan[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truthsig, dbfit$cluster[keep])

    preddb <- ifelse(dbfit$cluster == 0, "noise", paste0("cl", dbfit$cluster))
    resfull$dbscan[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truthall, as.factor(preddb))
  }

  if (!is.null(hdbfit)) {
    ressignal$hdbscan[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truthsig, hdbfit$cluster[keep])

    predhdb <- ifelse(hdbfit$cluster == 0, "noise", paste0("cl", hdbfit$cluster))
    resfull$hdbscan[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truthall, as.factor(predhdb))
  }

  if (!is.null(spfit)) {
    sps <- as.vector(spfit)
    ressignal$spectral[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truthsig, sps[keep])

    predsp <- as.factor(paste0("cl", sps))
    resfull$spectral[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truthall, predsp)
  }

  if (!is.null(singlefit)) {
    ressignal$single[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truthsig, singlefit[keep])

    predsingle <- as.factor(paste0("cl", singlefit))
    resfull$single[i] <- adjustedRandIndex(truthall, predsingle)
  }

  cat(
    "Finished", i,
    "| signal db =", round(ressignal$dbscan[i], 3),
    "hdb =", round(ressignal$hdbscan[i], 3),
    "sp =", round(ressignal$spectral[i], 3),
    "single =", round(ressignal$single[i], 3),
    "| full db =", round(resfull$dbscan[i], 3),
    "hdb =", round(resfull$hdbscan[i], 3),
    "sp =", round(resfull$spectral[i], 3),
    "single =", round(resfull$single[i], 3),
    "\n"
  )
}

```






```{r gennoiseless}
makepointcaptcha_noiseless <- function(
  text = randtext(),
  width = 200,
  height = 80,
  pointsize = sample(32:38, 1),
  distort = TRUE,
  cutoff = 0.95
) {
  chars <- strsplit(text, "")[[1]]
  n <- length(chars)

  img <- magick::image_blank(width = width, height = height, color = "white")

  basey <- sample(round(height * 0.54):round(height * 0.66), 1)
  estcharw <- pointsize * 0.66
  steps <- sample(
    seq(round(estcharw * 0.80), round(estcharw * 0.95)),
    n - 1,
    replace = TRUE
  )

  xpos <- numeric(n)
  xpos[1] <- sample(10:18, 1)

  if (n > 1) {
    for (j in 2:n) {
      xpos[j] <- xpos[j - 1] + steps[j - 1]
    }
  }

  rightedge <- max(xpos) + estcharw + 15
  if (rightedge > width) {
    shift <- rightedge - width
    xpos <- pmax(3, xpos - shift)
  }

  ypos <- basey + sample(-3:3, n, replace = TRUE)
  rot <- sample(-10:10, n, replace = TRUE)

  # --- draw characters
  for (j in seq_len(n)) {
    charimg <- magick::image_blank(width = 70, height = 70, color = "none") |>
      magick::image_annotate(
        text = chars[j],
        size = pointsize,
        color = "black",
        gravity = "center"
      ) |>
      magick::image_rotate(rot[j])

    img <- magick::image_composite(
      img,
      charimg,
      offset = paste0("+", round(xpos[j]), "+", round(ypos[j] - 35))
    )
  }

  # --- mild global distortion only (no chaos)
  if (distort) {
    disttype <- sample(c("none", "shear", "rotate"), 1)

    if (disttype == "shear") {
      img <- magick::image_shear(
        img,
        geometry = sprintf("%dx%d", sample(-4:4, 1), sample(-2:2, 1))
      )
    } else if (disttype == "rotate") {
      img <- magick::image_rotate(img, runif(1, -6, 6))
    }
  }

  img <- img |>
    magick::image_background("white", flatten = TRUE) |>
    magick::image_extent(
      geometry = sprintf("%dx%d", width, height),
      gravity = "center",
      color = "white"
    )

  # --- convert to points (NO fuzz, NO thinning, NO noise)
  pts <- imgtopoints(
    img,
    cutoff = cutoff,
    fuzzband = NULL,
    fuzzprob = 0,
    border = 2
  ) |>
    croppoints(pad = 1)

  pts$label <- "signal"

  list(
    text = text,
    pts = pts
  )
}
```

```{r class}
z <- makepointcaptcha_noiseless(text = "eggplant")

oldx <- z$pts$x
oldy <- z$pts$y
z$pts$x <- -oldy
z$pts$y <- oldx
z$pts$x <- z$pts$x - min(z$pts$x)
z$pts$y <- z$pts$y - min(z$pts$y)
z$pts$x <- max(z$pts$x) - z$pts$x

z$text

ggplot(z$pts, aes(x, -y)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.6) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void()


```



```{r noiseless}
savegoodz_noiseless <- function(z, path = "goodzs_noiseless.rds") {
  if (file.exists(path)) {
    db <- readRDS(path)
  } else {
    db <- list()
  }

  id <- paste0("z", length(db) + 1)
  db[[id]] <- z

  saveRDS(db, path)

  message("Saved as ", id, " in ", path)
  invisible(id)
}


```

```{r noiseless save}
savegoodz_noiseless(z)
```

```{r noiseless hdbscan}
goodzs <- readRDS("goodzs_noiseless.rds")

pts <- goodzs$z3$pts
hdb <- hdbscan(as.matrix(pts[, c("x", "y")]), minPts = 11)
pts$cluster <- factor(hdb$cluster)

ggplot(pts, aes(x, -y, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.7) +
  scale_color_viridis_d(option = "turbo") +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = "none")


```

```{r noiseless dbscan}
goodzs <- readRDS("goodzs_noiseless.rds")
pts <- goodzs$z3$pts

x <- pts[, c("x", "y")]

epsvals <- seq(0.001, 0.03, by = 0.001)

res <- lapply(epsvals, function(e) {
  db <- dbscan(x, eps = e, minPts = 3)
  labs <- db$cluster
  k <- length(unique(labs[labs != 0]))
  data.frame(eps = e, ncluster = k, nnoise = sum(labs == 0))
})

tab <- do.call(rbind, res)
print(tab)

pick <- which(tab$ncluster > 1)[1]

if (is.na(pick)) {
  stop("No eps value in the search grid produced more than one cluster.")
}

besteps <- tab$eps[pick]
cat("Using eps =", besteps, "\n")

db <- dbscan(x, eps = besteps, minPts = 3)

pts$cluster <- factor(db$cluster)

ggplot(pts, aes(x, -y, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.7) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = "none")
```


```{r forced-fragmentation}
library(dbscan)
library(ggplot2)

goodzs <- readRDS("goodzs_noiseless.rds")
pts <- goodzs$z2$pts
x <- pts[, c("x", "y")]

db <- dbscan(x, eps = 0.003, minPts = 2)

pts$cluster <- factor(db$cluster)

table(db$cluster)

ggplot(pts, aes(x, -y, color = cluster)) +
  geom_point(size = 0.7) +
  coord_equal() +
  theme_void() +
  guides(color = "none")


```
